perturbation.original_text: Each monthly installment should be payable in advance and due no --- later than the fifth (5th) of the month.
perturbation.changed_text: Each monthly installment should be payable in arrears and due no later than the fifth (5th) of the month.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by stating that monthly installments are payable 'in arrears' instead of 'in advance'. This contradicts the initial implication that payments are expected before the service is rendered, leading to uncertainty about the payment schedule. This could create disputes about when the payments should be made, thus creating an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Sponsorship, Advertising and Exclusivity Fees. Client will pay Intuit sponsorship and advertising fees of $2,644,010 and an exclusivity fee of $661,003. Such fees shall be paid to Intuit as follows. An initial fee of $[***] shall be due and payable on the Effective Date. The remaining --- balance of $[***] shall be paid to Intuit in 12 equal monthly installments --- of [***]. Each monthly installment should be payable in arrears and due no --- later than the fifth (5th) of the month.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that installments are payable 'in advance,' implying payment before the service. The changed text states they are payable 'in arrears,' meaning payment after the service. The contradicted text relies on the 'in arrears' term, directly contradicting the original intention of advance payment. This inconsistency creates a clear and significant conflict regarding payment timing, making it difficult to determine when payment is due, thus leading to disputes and unenforceability.

perturbation.original_text: All undisputed payments that have accrued prior to the termination or expiration of this Agreement for any reason will be payable in full within thirty (30) days thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: All undisputed payments that have accrued prior to the termination or expiration of this Agreement for any reason will be payable in full immediately.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the payment term from 'within thirty (30) days' to 'immediately', this creates an in-text contradiction. It makes the clause inconsistent regarding the time frame for settling outstanding dues upon termination. This change leads to uncertainty and creates room for disputes over payment deadlines, due to the in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Either party may terminate this Agreement if the other party materially breaches a material obligation hereunder and such breach remains uncured for thirty (30) days following the notice to the breaching party of the breach and the notifying party's intention to terminate. All undisputed payments that have accrued prior to the termination or expiration of this Agreement for any reason will be payable in full immediately. In addition, upon the termination of this Agreement by Client for any reason, a pro-rata amount of the Monthly Payment Fee shall be refunded to Client calculated as follows: the Monthly Payment Fee less the cost of the Impressions displayed for such month as of the effective date of the termination, calculated on an average CPM basis.
perturbation.justification: The changed text mandates 'immediate' payment upon termination, while the original text allowed 'thirty (30) days'. The contradicted text includes the changed clause, creating an in-text contradiction regarding the payment deadline upon termination. The original text and changed text have conflicting terms for payment, resulting in an inconsistency.
